0: I promise not to do a mischief upon you, royal sapling. This artful artisan is here to help!

1: Like I said, I make a habit of making weapons. Where you have the wherewithal, I've got the goods!

5: Request to keep your aetherpool gear.

9: You want to use the king's gift <Emphasis>outside</Emphasis> of the churches? Mmm...maybe when you're older!

10: You must clear the area beyond stone 30 and complete the subsequent quest in order to use aetherpool gear outside of Pilgrim's Traverse.

11: You want things already!? But you've only just started exploring... And I don't feel like working...

12: You must clear the area beyond traverse stone 30 and complete the subsequent quest in order to forge illumed aetherpool grips.

13: Hmm... You should put the king's gift to more use, fatten it up with the fruits of victory. It looks far too frail to survive my mischief.

14: In order to forge an illumed aetherpool grip, both your illumed aetherpool weapon and armor must have attained a minimum strength of +10.

15: Grand! Now to wiggle the memories of battle loose─just like working free a mortal's soul!

16:
Forge an illumed aetherpool grip?
<UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>※The strength of your illumed aetherpool arm and armor will be reduced by 10.<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

18: What is there to be found in the churches?

19: Can aetherpool arms be used outside of the churches?

21: The ramshackle scraps of lives left behind. Pixies can weave a dream out of anything, but you mortals are so picky when it comes to gifts!

22: So bring me aether-rich shards from inside the church, and I'll use them to spin you glory out of glass.

23: Neither will I refuse pretty pebbles or glamorous gobs. Whatever tickles my fancy will earn you an even trade!

24: Yes, but only with the help of Ose Wyd! The king's gift is glorious but also dangerously delicate. Left alone for long, it will become brittle as bark!

25: That's where I come in. With a flick of the wrist, I can pluck out its strongest moments and make them last for an age─wherever and whenever you need them!

26: To use your illumed aetherpool weapon outside of Pilgrim's Traverse, you must first forge illumed aetherpool grips.

27: Forging one grip will reduce the strength of your illumed aetherpool arm and armor by 10.
